BPHS_TRADITION.title: Brihat Parashara Hora Shastra

SERENOVA_CONVENTION.title: Serenova Explicit Working Conventions
SERENOVA_CONVENTION.notes: Used where traditions differ. Every such rule must expose its assumptions and remain expert-reviewable.

SERENOVA_SYNTHESIS.title: Serenova Evidence Synthesis Heuristics
SERENOVA_SYNTHESIS.notes: Support and activation summaries are not classical sutras, probabilities, or guaranteed predictions.
